metadata.name: Request Track Access for Utility Work

description: A utility company needs to work near a railway track and must request permission to ensure the safety of their workers.

nodes.task_description: The utility company submits a track access request via a public portal, specifying the location, date, and time.

expected_outcome.expected: The request is received by the railroad.

nodes.task_description: A railroad agent reviews the request and the location.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent understands the scope of the work.

nodes.task_description: The agent determines that a railroad flagman must be present to protect the work crew.
The agent approves the request, conditional on the utility company paying for the flagman, and schedules a flagman for the job.

expected_outcome.expected: The work is approved with the necessary safety measures in place.
